text: Do not spend too much time on one question
Be happy to SKIP difficult questions
If you know the answer is wrong you can’t choose it (close isn’t good enough)
QUICKLY recognize when you do not know the answer
You do not have to know the answer to get the question right
If you have a spot diagnosis check text to confirm it
If you are scoring badly it is normal to feel that way — keep going hard
Always race against the clock (even if way ahead)
If there is a weird answer choice and you can’t justify it don’t choose it
You are not supposed to read long things
Find out what is going on — Quick scan → then decide what to read
